violations.protocol_rule: Before every modifying action verify active milestone, protocol point, change boundary, next test and rollback; tools/** was explicitly forbidden for M0 evidence work.
violations.actual_action: tools/m1_baseline_audit.py was temporarily replaced by instrumentation at commit ebf186d6991f2dc5108b69c6693d1e8f5aa8450e.
violations.why_noncompliant: The modifying path was outside the declared allowed boundary. A later zero-net-tree rollback does not retroactively authorize the action.
violations.claim_effect: No PASS, completion or boundary-compliance claim may be derived from the rollback.
violations.preventive_control: During M0 remediation, writes are limited to docs/evidence/agent_v3_1/** and PR metadata. Any required executable instrumentation must be a separately named future stage with explicit permission.
violations.residual_risk: The historical action remains noncompliant even though repository content was restored.

violations.protocol_rule: A forward stage/tool transition must be explicitly named and authorized; only fixes inside an already failed current stage may continue automatically.
violations.actual_action: The recursive-tree instrumentation path was selected and executed without a separate explicitly named permission for modifying tools/m1_baseline_audit.py.
violations.why_noncompliant: The action was not merely a rerun of an unchanged M0 evidence check; it introduced a new modifying mechanism outside the previously declared boundary.
violations.claim_effect: The acquired historical tree may be retained as historical evidence for d5afcf5 only, but the acquisition procedure cannot be represented as protocol-compliant.
violations.preventive_control: WO-M0-012 stays within M0 remediation and does not modify product, tests, tools or workflows.
violations.residual_risk: Conversation evidence establishes the missing permission, but cannot undo the original transition.

violations.protocol_rule: Claims cannot exceed factual evidence; exact-head results from different commits may not be combined.
violations.actual_action: Duplicate risk was marked RESOLVED_L0_STATIC for the active PR while the complete tree was generated for earlier target head d5afcf5 and semantic content inspection was selective.
violations.why_noncompliant: A complete path list is not equivalent to exhaustive semantic absence proof, and evidence for d5afcf5 is not current-head evidence for c715d4b or later commits.
violations.required_correction: Reopen duplicate risk as PARTIAL_L0_STATIC / SEMANTIC_ABSENCE_UNVERIFIED, remove migration authorization, and separately reconstruct the final current-head tree.
violations.residual_risk: A semantically equivalent component may exist under neutral naming or in content not previously inspected.
